_comment: Local-laptop DetectGPT config. N=10 perturbations + small scoring/mask models so the run fits a 4070 8 GB budget in a few hours. Paper-grade is GPT-Neo-2.7B + t5-large + N=100 (see baselines_paper_faithful.json) for the eval pod. Footnote: per Mitchell et al. 2023 ablation, N=10 is ~3-5 pp AUROC below N=100, paper-grade should supersede this when the pod is available.
